## Security and Permissions

- [ ] CHK001 Verify capability checks protect every admin or privileged action
- [ ] CHK002 Verify nonces, sanitization, and escaping match each request/output path
- [ ] CHK003 Verify external requests use WordPress APIs with timeouts and error handling

## WordPress Integration

- [ ] CHK004 Verify hooks, filters, rewrite rules, and lifecycle hooks are used
  instead of theme edits or direct filesystem mutation
- [ ] CHK005 Verify feature toggles preserve default WordPress behavior when disabled
- [ ] CHK006 Verify uninstall, migration, and compatibility behavior are covered

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Add feature-specific categories for compatibility, performance, i18n, and
  WordPress.org review requirements when applicable
